reasoning: AICO (Autoridades Indígenas de Colombia) is a small indigenous political party that primarily competes for the 2 special indigenous seats in the 108-seat Colombian Senate. Historically, they have never won more than 1 or 2 seats, while major parties and coalitions (such as the Historical Pact, Conservative Party, Liberal Party, Democratic Center, etc.) win 10 to 20 seats each. Because of the structure of the Senate and the party's entirely concentrated voter base, it is extremely improbable that AICO would win the national constituency and win the most seats in the 2026 election.
